series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of records resulting from filings submitted to claim exemptions in Ohio Revised Code 1707.03(X) & 1707.03(Y). These files also contain applications submitted to the division filed pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 1707.06 and 1707.08, for the registration of securities transactions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for 8 years from date of initial filing, or scanned and verified then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records on database for 8 years from date of initial filing, then destroy by erasure., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
